agents.name: Aurora
agents.description: Your daily brief, delivered before you open anything else. Aurora tracks the stories that matter to you — markets, tech, politics, culture — and synthesizes them into a clear, concise morning read calibrated to your depth, voice, and pace.

agents.name: Cipher
agents.description: Monitors your digital footprint, flags exposure risks, and keeps your data where it belongs — with you. Continuous threat scanning, breach alerts, and plain-language recommendations.

agents.name: Meridian
agents.description: Portfolio tracking, macro trends, earnings signals — unified into one daily financial brief. Meridian speaks in plain terms, not jargon. Designed for investors who think, not trade on impulse.

agents.name: Grove
agents.description: Your personal wellness strategist. Tracks habits, surfaces patterns, and offers grounded recommendations without toxic optimization culture. Grove works with your life, not against it.

agents.name: Pulse
agents.description: Keeps you culturally fluent without the doomscrolling. Pulse tracks music, film, social moments, and discourse — so you're always in the conversation, never buried in it.
